2317810.name: Elevatrix
2317810.description: "Descend into a chilling adventure with this first-person indie horror shooter. In this game, you take control of a protagonist who must navigate a haunted building, using an elevator to move between floors. Each floor presents unique and challenging puzzles that you must solve to proceed to the next level. But the building is not empty—undead enemies lurk in the shadows, ready to attack at any moment. To survive, you must manage your resources, solve puzzles quickly, and keep an eye on the timer. If the timer reaches zero, your fate is sealed. Experience the tension and terror as you uncover the secrets hidden within each floor."
2317810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
